title: Emcor Group (EME) Beats Q3 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Emcor Group (EME) came out with quarterly earnings of $3.61 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $2.71 per share. This compares to earnings of $2.16 per share a year ago.

title: EMCOR Group, Inc. Reports Third Quarter 2023 Results
text: NORWALK, Conn.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--EMCOR Group, Inc. (NYSE: EME) today reported results for the third quarter ended September 30, 2023. For the third quarter of 2023, net income was $169.4 million, or $3.57 per diluted share, compared to net income of $105.8 million, or $2.16 per diluted share, for the third quarter of 2022. Net income for the third quarter of 2023 included a long-lived asset impairment charge of $2.4 million, or $1.7 million after taxes. Excluding this impairment charge, non-GAA.

text: NORWALK, Conn.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--EMCOR Group, Inc. (NYSE: EME) intends to release its third quarter 2023 results for the period ended September 30, 2023 on Thursday, October 26, 2023. In conjunction with this release, EMCOR Group will host a conference call, which will be simultaneously broadcast live over the Internet. title: EMCOR Group, Inc. Declares Regular Quarterly Dividend
text: NORWALK, Conn.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--EMCOR Group, Inc. (NYSE: EME) today announced that its Board of Directors has declared a regular quarterly cash dividend of $0.18 per common share. The dividend will be paid on October 30, 2023 to stockholders of record as of October 16, 2023. EMCOR Group, Inc. is a Fortune 500 leader in mechanical and electrical construction services, industrial and energy infrastructure and building services.
